title: Huawei AR180Pro Dual Band WiFi 7 Router
description: Huawei AR180Pro is a high-performance dual-band Wi-Fi 7 router , operating simultaneously on two bands ( 2.4GHz and 5GHz ) to achieve a maximum data transfer rate of up to 3.57Gbps . The router is equipped with (2) 2.5G ports , (4) Gbit ports and supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). It features modern technologies such as MU-MIMO , 4096-QAM and MLO . The device's maximum power consumption is 13.5W Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) - extremely fast and stable connectivity (2) 2.5G LAN/WAN ports (1x Turbo) , (3) Gbit LAN/WAN ports and (1) Gbit LAN port (preferential forwarding of Turbo port traffic) Total throughput up to 3.57Gbps - 0.69Gbps on 2.4GHz (2Ã2) and 2.88Gbps on 5GHz (2Ã2) Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Easy management via the eKit SNC / eKit mobile app Smart Mesh technology allows up to 8 devices to form a unified mesh network, intelligently switching connections for stable operation and minimizing signal interruptions Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS and IPSec VPN Device Power adapter and cable Rubber feet
